app.title: Multi-AGV Dispatch Console
app.subtitle: Simulate · Verify · Replay
controls.title: Run parameters
controls.hint: Nodes are control points; arrows are lanes. On run, the engine drives every AGV to its goal collision-free.
field.empty.title: No simulation yet
field.empty.hint: Set parameters on the left, then press Run.
ribbon.title: Reservation ribbon
ribbon.subtitle: who · where · when — the evidence behind "collision-free"
ribbon.empty: After a run, shows which control point each AGV holds over ticks.
telemetry.title: Run telemetry
telemetry.status.completed.title: Collision-free
telemetry.status.completed.desc: Every AGV reached its goal with no control-point conflicts.
telemetry.status.collision.title: Collision detected
telemetry.status.collision.desc: At tick {tick}, AGV {agents} contended for the same control point.
telemetry.status.didNotConverge.title: Did not converge
telemetry.status.didNotConverge.desc: Not all AGVs reached their goal within the tick budget.
telemetry.empty: After a run, shows status and per-AGV detail.
